content: The intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) that power autonomous curious agents can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems, where unexpected, high-information memory traces are reinforced and low-value obsolete traces are faded out automatically. This creates a self-sustaining memory architecture that doesn’t require human annotation of which memories to retain for future active learning tasks.
